description: You use the elements in the file folder to perform operations on the local file system. Because these services interact directly with server directories and files, it is important to ensure that they operate only on approved locations to prevent unauthorized access or changes.

services.name: pub.file:bytesToFile
description: WmPublic. Writes the specified byte array to a file.

input_parameters.name: fileName
description: The absolute path name of the file to which to write the byte array.

input_parameters.name: bytes
description: The byte array to write to the file specified in the filename parameter.

input_parameters.name: append
description: Set to:
- true to append to the file if the file already exists.
- false to overwrite the file if the file already exists.

output_parameters.name: length
description: Number of bytes written to the file.

usage_notes: For security reasons, the pub.file:bytesToFile service validates the input fileName against the list of allowed paths defined in the watt.server.file.canWritePaths parameter. If the specified path is not in the allowed list, Integration Server throws an exception. For more information about the server configuration parameter, see Server Configuration Parameters

services.name: pub.file:checkFileExistence
description: WmPublic. Checks if a specified file exists, and if the file exists, checks whether the file name represents a file or a directory.

input_parameters.name: fileName
description: The absolute path name of the file to be checked.

output_parameters.name: exists
description: - true indicates that the specified fileName exists.
- false indicates that the specified fileName does not exist.

output_parameters.name: isDirectory
description: - true indicates that the specified fileName is a directory.
- false indicates that the specified fileName is a file.

usage_notes: For security reasons, the pub.file:checkFileExistence service validates the input fileName against the list of allowed paths defined in the watt.server.file.canReadPaths parameter. If the specified path is not in the allowed list, Integration Server throws an exception. For more information about the server configuration parameter, see Server Configuration Parameters

services.name: pub.file:copyFile
description: WmPublic. Copies a file from one directory to another.
If a file with the same name as the file being copied exists in the targetDirectory, the pub.file:copyFile service throws an error on execution.

input_parameters.name: fileName
description: The absolute path name of the file to be copied.

input_parameters.name: targetDirectory
description: Directory to which the file specified in the fileName parameter will be copied.

input_parameters.name: appendTimestamp
description: - true to append a timestamp to the target fileName in the yyyyMMddHHmmss format.
- false to omit a timestamp from the target fileName.

output_parameters.name: targetFileName
description: The absolute path name of the target file to which the fileName parameter is copied.

usage_notes: For security reasons, the pub.file:copyFile service validates the input fileName against the list of allowed paths defined in the watt.server.file.canReadPaths parameter and the input targetDirectory against the list of allowed paths defined in the watt.server.file.canWritePaths parameter. If the specified file name or directory is not in the respective allowed lists, or if an invalid file path is specified, Integration Server throws an exception. For more information about the server configuration parameters, see Server Configuration Parameters

services.name: pub.file:deleteFile
description: WmPublic. Deletes the specified file.

input_parameters.name: fileName
description: The absolute path name of the file to be deleted.

output_parameters.name: status
description: - true indicates that the deletion succeeded.
- false indicates that the deletion failed.

usage_notes: For security reasons, the pub.file:deleteFile service validates the input fileName against the list of allowed paths defined in the watt.server.file.canDeletePaths parameter. If the specified path is not in the allowed list, Integration Server throws an exception. For more information about the server configuration parameter, see Server Configuration Parameters

services.name: pub.file:getFile
description: WmPublic. Retrieves a specified file from the local file system.
If the file contains an XML document, you can use the services in the XML Folder to convert it to an XML node.

input_parameters.name: filename
description: The absolute path name of the file in the local file system (for example c:\rubicon\document.xml).

input_parameters.name: loadAs
description: - bytes to return the file as a byte array. Use this option if the contents of the file will be used as input to a service that operates on whole documents (for example, pub.xml:queryXMLNode). This is the default.

- stream to return the file as an input stream. Use this option if the contents of the file will be used as input to a service that can process a document incrementally (for example, pub.xml:getXMLNodeIterator).
- string to return the file as a string.
- reader to return the file as a reader.

input_parameters.name: encoding
description: Optional. Character set in which the file is encoded. Specify an IANA-registered character set (for example, ISO-8859-1). This information is required to correctly convert the String object to bytes when performing a get. If no value is specified or if the value is set to autoDetect, the service uses the default operating system encoding. If you specify an unsupported encoding, the system throws an exception.

input_parameters.name: bufferSize
description: Optional. Buffer size (in bytes) to use if you are loading an InputStream (that is, loadAs=stream). The default is 4096 bytes.

input_parameters.name: largeFile
description: Note: Files larger than the system memory are considered as large files.

output_parameters.name: body
description: Document (IData object) containing the file as a byte[ ], InputStream, string, or reader. The body parameter will contain one of the following keys, depending on how the loadAs parameter was set:

children.name: bytes
description: Conditional. Returns file contents in a byte array if the loadAs parameter is set to bytes.

children.name: stream
description: Conditional. Returns file contents as an InputStream if the loadAs parameter is set to stream.

children.name: reader
description: Conditional. Returns file contents as a reader if the loadAs parameter is set to reader.

children.name: string
description: Conditional. Returns file contents as a string if the loadAs parameter is set to string.

usage_notes: The getFile service does not automatically generate an XML node from the contents of the file. To generate an XML node, the output from this service must be passed to the pub.xml:xmlStringToXMLNode service.

The pub.file:getFile service first checks the value of the watt.security.pub.getFile.checkReadAllowed parameter to determine whether it must validate the requested file path against the paths listed in the watt.server.file.canReadPaths parameter.

- If watt.security.pub.getFile.checkReadAllowed is set to true, the pub.file:getFile service checks whether the specified filename is in the list of allowed paths defined in the watt.server.file.canReadPaths parameter. If the filename appears in the allowed list, the service retrieves the file. If the filename is not in the list, the service throws an exception.
- If watt.security.pub.getFile.checkReadAllowed is set to false, the pub.file:getFile service retrieves the specified file without checking the watt.server.file.canReadPaths parameter.
For more information about the watt.server.file.canReadPaths server configuration parameter, see Server Configuration Parameters

services.name: pub.file:getFileProperties
description: WmPublic. Retrieves properties for a specified file, such as creation date, last modified date, file size, and file type.

input_parameters.name: filePath
description: The absolute path of the file for which you want to retrieve properties. For example, c:\rubicon\document.xml.

output_parameters.name: createdDate
description: The file creation timestamp in the yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss format.

output_parameters.name: modifiedDate
description: The last modified timestamp in the yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss format.

output_parameters.name: fileSize
description: The size of the file in bytes.

output_parameters.name: fileType
description: The type or extension of a file.

usage_notes: The pub.file:getFileProperties service first checks the value of the watt.security.pub.getFile.checkReadAllowed parameter to determine whether it must validate the requested file path against the paths listed in the watt.server.file.canReadPaths parameter.

- If watt.security.pub.getFile.checkReadAllowed is set to true, the pub.file:getFileProperties service checks whether the specified filePath is in the list of allowed paths defined in the watt.server.file.canReadPaths parameter. If the filePath appears in the allowed list, the service retrieves the file properties. If the filePath is not in the list, the service throws an exception.

- If watt.security.pub.getFile.checkReadAllowed is set to false, the pub.file:getFileProperties service retrieves properties of the specified file without checking the watt.server.file.canReadPaths parameter.
For more information about the watt.server.file.canReadPaths server configuration parameter, see Server Configuration Parameters

services.name: pub.file:listFiles
description: WmPublic. List all the files in a specified directory.
The pub.file:listFiles service does not list subdirectories or recursively list subdirectory contents.

input_parameters.name: directory
description: Name of the directory that is to be queried.

input_parameters.name: filter
description: Optional. Filter string for the file list (for example, *.java or EDI*.tx*).

output_parameters.name: fileList
description: filel]List does not list subdirectories or recursively list subdirectory content.

output_parameters.name: numFiles
description: Number of files in the specified directory.

usage_notes: For security reasons, the pub.file:listFiles service validates the value of the directory against the list of allowed paths defined in the watt.server.file.canReadPaths parameter. If the specified directory is not in the allowed list, Integration Server throws an exception. For more information about the server configuration parameter, see Server Configuration Parameters

services.name: pub.file:moveFile
description: WmPublic. Moves a file from one directory to another.

input_parameters.name: fileName
description: The absolute path name of the file to be moved.

input_parameters.name: targetDirectory
description: Name of the directory to which the file specified in the fileName parameter is to be moved.

input_parameters.name: appendTimeStamp
description: - false if you do not want to append a timestamp. This is the default.
- true if you want to append a timestamp in the following format: yyyyMMddHHmmss.

output_parameters.name: status
description: - true indicates that the move was successful.
- false indicates that the move failed.

output_parameters.name: targetFileName
description: Fully qualified path of the target file.

usage_notes: For security reasons, the pub.file:moveFile service validates the input fileName against the list of allowed paths defined in the watt.server.file.canReadPaths parameter and the input targetDirectory against the list of allowed paths defined in the watt.server.file.canWritePaths parameter. If the specified file name or directory is not in the respective allowed lists, Integration Server throws an exception. For more information about the server configuration parameters, see Server Configuration Parameters

If the service cannot move the file by using the default move operation in Java, the service copies the file from the source directory to the destination directory, and then removes the file from the source directory.
If a file with the same name as the fileName parameter exists in the target directory, the pub.file:moveFile service throws an error.

services.name: pub.file:readerToFile
description: WmPublic. Reads data from a java.io.Reader object and writes it to a file.

input_parameters.name: fileName
description: Fully qualified name of the file to which the data is to be written.

input_parameters.name: reader
description: The reader object from which the data is read.

input_parameters.name: append
description: Set to:
- true to append if the file already exists.
- false to overwrite if the file already exists.

input_parameters.name: encoding
description: If you specify an unsupported encoding, the system throws an exception. If no value is specified or if the encoding is set to autoDetect, the default operating system encoding is used.

usage_notes: For security reasons, the pub.file:readerToFile service validates the input fileName against the list of allowed paths defined in the watt.server.file.canWritePaths parameter. If the specified path is not in the allowed list, Integration Server throws an exception. For more information about the server configuration parameter, see Server Configuration Parameters
The readerToFile service does not automatically close the reader object. To close the reader, use the pub.io:close service.

services.name: pub.file:streamToFile
description: WmPublic. Writes the data in the InputStream to a file.

input_parameters.name: fileName
description: Fully qualified name of the file to be written to.

input_parameters.name: stream
description: The stream from which data is read.

input_parameters.name: append
description: Set to:
- true to append if the file already exists.
- false to overwrite if the file already exists.

usage_notes: For security reasons, the pub.file:streamToFile service validates the input fileName against the list of allowed paths defined in the watt.server.file.canWritePaths parameter. If the specified path is not in the allowed list, Integration Server throws an exception. For more information about the server configuration parameter, see Server Configuration Parameters
The streamToFile service does not automatically close the stream object. To close the input stream, use the pub.io:close service.

services.name: pub.file:stringToFile
description: WmPublic. Writes text to a file.

input_parameters.name: fileName
description: Fully qualified name of the file to be written to.

input_parameters.name: data
description: Text to be written.

input_parameters.name: append
description: Set to:
- true to append if the file already exists.
- false to overwrite if the file already exists.

input_parameters.name: encoding
description: If you specify an unsupported encoding, the system throws an exception. If no value is specified or if the encoding is set to autoDetect, the default operating system encoding is used.

usage_notes: For security reasons, the pub.file:stringToFile service validates the input fileName against the list of allowed paths defined in the watt.server.file.canWritePaths parameter. If the specified path is not in the allowed list, Integration Server throws an exception. For more information about the server configuration parameter, see Server Configuration Parameters
